% generated by Ott 0.34 from: report.ott
\newcommand{\rpdrule}[4][]{{\displaystyle\frac{\begin{array}{l}#2\end{array}}{#3}\quad\rpdrulename{#4}}}
\newcommand{\rpusedrule}[1]{\[#1\]}
\newcommand{\rppremise}[1]{ #1 \\}
\newenvironment{rpdefnblock}[3][]{ \framebox{\mbox{#2}} \quad #3 \\[0pt]}{}
\newenvironment{rpfundefnblock}[3][]{ \framebox{\mbox{#2}} \quad #3 \\[0pt]\begin{displaymath}\begin{array}{l}}{\end{array}\end{displaymath}}
\newcommand{\rpfunclause}[2]{ #1 \equiv #2 \\}
\newcommand{\rpnt}[1]{\mathit{#1}}
\newcommand{\rpmv}[1]{\mathit{#1}}
\newcommand{\rpkw}[1]{\mathbf{#1}}
\newcommand{\rpsym}[1]{#1}
\newcommand{\rpcom}[1]{\text{#1}}
\newcommand{\rpdrulename}[1]{\textsc{#1}}
\newcommand{\rpcomplu}[5]{\overline{#1}^{\,#2\in #3 #4 #5}}
\newcommand{\rpcompu}[3]{\overline{#1}^{\,#2<#3}}
\newcommand{\rpcomp}[2]{\overline{#1}^{\,#2}}
\newcommand{\rpgrammartabular}[1]{\begin{supertabular}{llcllllll}#1\end{supertabular}}
\newcommand{\rpmetavartabular}[1]{\begin{supertabular}{ll}#1\end{supertabular}}
\newcommand{\rprulehead}[3]{$#1$ & & $#2$ & & & \multicolumn{2}{l}{#3}}
\newcommand{\rpprodline}[6]{& & $#1$ & $#2$ & $#3 #4$ & $#5$ & $#6$}
\newcommand{\rpfirstprodline}[6]{\rpprodline{#1}{#2}{#3}{#4}{#5}{#6}}
\newcommand{\rplongprodline}[2]{& & $#1$ & \multicolumn{4}{l}{$#2$}}
\newcommand{\rpfirstlongprodline}[2]{\rplongprodline{#1}{#2}}
\newcommand{\rpbindspecprodline}[6]{\rpprodline{#1}{#2}{#3}{#4}{#5}{#6}}
\newcommand{\rpprodnewline}{\\}
\newcommand{\rpinterrule}{\\[5.0mm]}
\newcommand{\rpafterlastrule}{\\}
\newcommand{\rpmetavars}{
\rpmetavartabular{
 $ \rpmv{tname} ,\, \rpmv{x} ,\, \rpmv{y} ,\, \rpmv{z} ,\, \rpmv{f} ,\, \rpmv{g} ,\, \rpmv{n} $ & \rpcom{variables} \\
 $ \rpmv{ident} $ &  \\
 $ \rpmv{lowerident} $ & \rpcom{lowercase identifier} \\
 $ \rpmv{upperident} $ & \rpcom{capitalized identifier} \\
 $ \rpmv{intlit} $ & \rpcom{integer literals} \\
 $ \rpmv{strlit} $ & \rpcom{string literals} \\
 $ \rpmv{evidx} $ & \rpcom{evidence index for dictionary passing} \\
 $ \rpmv{index} ,\, \rpmv{i} ,\, \rpmv{j} ,\, \rpmv{n} ,\, \rpmv{m} $ & \rpcom{index variables} \\
}}

\newcommand{\rpconst}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{const}}{::=}{\rpcom{constants}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{intlit}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpmv{strlit}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpkw{true}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpkw{false}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{()}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpctor}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{ctor}}{::=}{\rpcom{constructor}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{upperident}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpexpr}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{expr}  ,\ \rpnt{e}}{::=}{\rpcom{term}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpnt{const}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{constant}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpmv{tname}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{variable}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \lambda\  \rpmv{x} .\  \rpnt{e} }{}{\textsf{bind}\; \rpmv{x}\; \textsf{in}\; \rpnt{e}}{}{\rpcom{lambda abstraction}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\mathbf{let} \, \rpmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{=}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \mathbf{and} \, .. \, \mathbf{and} \, \rpmv{x_{\rpmv{n}}}  \rpsym{=}  \rpnt{e_{\rpmv{n}}} \, \mathbf{in} \, \rpnt{e'}}{}{\textsf{bind}\; \rpmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}..\rpmv{x_{\rpmv{n}}}\; \textsf{in}\; \rpnt{e'}}{}{\rpcom{letexp}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{e} \, \rpnt{e'}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{function application}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{)}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{product}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{e}  \rpsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\mathbf{if} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \mathbf{then} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \mathbf{else} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{3}}}}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{conditional}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpkw{fix} \, \rpnt{e}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{fixpoint}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\mathbf{match} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,} \, .. \, \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{e_{\rpmv{n}}} \, \mathbf{with} \, Pmatrix}{}{}{}{\rpcom{pattern matching}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{e}  :  \rpnt{sch}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{type ascription}}}

\newcommand{\rppattern}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{pattern}  ,\ \rpnt{pat}}{::=}{\rpcom{patterns}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{tname}}{}{\textrm{xs}=\rpmv{tname}}{}{\rpcom{variable}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\_}{}{\textrm{xs}=\{\}}{}{\rpcom{wildcard}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{const}}{}{\textrm{xs}=\{\}}{}{\rpcom{constant}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{)}}{}{\textrm{xs}=\textrm{xs}(\rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}) \cup  \textrm{xs}(\rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{2}}}})}{}{\rpcom{product}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{ctor} \, \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, .. \, \rpnt{pat_{\rpmv{n}}}}{}{\textrm{xs}=\textrm{xs}(\rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}..\rpnt{pat_{\rpmv{n}}})}{}{\rpcom{constructor application}}}

\newcommand{\rppatbranch}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{patbranch}  ,\ \rpnt{pb}}{::=}{\rpcom{pattern branch}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,} \, .. \, \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{pat_{\rpmv{n}}}  \to  \rpnt{expr}}{}{\textsf{bind}\; \textrm{xs}(\rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}..\rpnt{pat_{\rpmv{n}}})\; \textsf{in}\; \rpnt{expr}}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rppatmatrix}{
\rprulehead{Pmatrix}{::=}{\rpcom{pattern matrix}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{|  \rpnt{pb_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  | \, .. \, |  \rpnt{pb_{\rpmv{m}}}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rptyctor}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{tyctor}}{::=}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{upperident}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Int} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Bool} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{String} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Unit} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rptyvar}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{tyvar}  ,\ \rpnt{tv}  ,\ \rpnt{a}  ,\ \rpnt{b}}{::=}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{lowerident}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rptvset}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{tvset}  ,\ \bar{\alpha}}{::=}{\rpcom{type variable set}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{ \varnothing }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \{  \rpnt{tv}  \} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \bar{\alpha}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \cup  \bar{\alpha}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \bar{\alpha}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \cap  \bar{\alpha}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \bar{\alpha}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \setminus  \bar{\alpha}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{ftv}( \Gamma ) }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{ftv}( \rpnt{ty} ) }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{ftv}( \bar{\pi} ) }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \mathsf{ftv}( \rpnt{pred} ) }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \bar{\alpha}  \rpsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpkvar}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{kvar}  ,\ \kappa}{::=}{\rpcom{higher-kinded type variable}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{lowerident}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rptyargs}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{tyargs}  ,\ \rpnt{tys}}{::=}{\rpcom{one or more type arguments}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpnt{ty}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{ty} \, \rpnt{tys}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rptypeexpr}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{typeexpr}  ,\ \rpnt{ty}  ,\ \tau}{::=}{\rpcom{type expression}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpnt{tyctor}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{nullary type constructor}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{tv}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{type variable}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{ty}  \to  \rpnt{ty'}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{arrow type}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{ty}  \times  \rpnt{ty'}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{product type}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{tyctor} \, \rpnt{tys}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{nominal type application}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\kappa \, \rpnt{tys}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{higher-kinded TV head application}}}

\newcommand{\rppredicate}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{predicate}  ,\ \rpnt{pred}  ,\ \pi}{::=}{\rpcom{predicate}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpnt{ctor} \, \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, .. \, \rpnt{ty_{\rpmv{n}}}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rppredicates}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{predicates}  ,\ \rpnt{preds}  ,\ \bar{\pi}}{::=}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\varnothing}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{pred}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{pred,}  \bar{\pi}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \bar{\pi}_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \bar{\pi}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpscheme}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{scheme}  ,\ \rpnt{sch}  ,\ \sigma}{::=}{\rpcom{scheme}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\forall \, \rpnt{tv_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, .. \, \rpnt{tv_{\rpmv{n}}}  .  \bar{\pi}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \bar{\alpha}  .  \bar{\pi}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{)}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{from tvset}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{ty}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{Monotype}}}

\newcommand{\rpcontext}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{context}  ,\ \Gamma}{::=}{\rpcom{typing environment}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\varnothing}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \Gamma ,  \rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{sch} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{sch}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \Gamma  \rpsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpconstraint}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{constraint}  ,\ \rpnt{c}}{::=}{\rpcom{constraint}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \sim  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{equality constraint}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \rpnt{pred} _ \rpmv{evidx} }{}{}{}{\rpcom{predicate constraint with evidence}}}

\newcommand{\rpconstraints}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{constraints}  ,\ \rpnt{C}}{::=}{\rpcom{constraint set}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\varnothing}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{c}}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{C}  \rpsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ,  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{}{}{}{\rpcom{set join}}}

\newcommand{\rpsubst}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{subst}  ,\ \theta}{::=}{\rpcom{substitution}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{ \varnothing }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \rpnt{tv}  \mapsto  \rpnt{ty} }{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \circ  \theta_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{}{}{}{\rpcom{composition}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpsym{(}  \theta  \rpsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpevidence}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{evidence}  ,\ \rpnt{ev}}{::=}{\rpcom{evidence term}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\rpmv{x}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{evidence variable}}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{\rpnt{ctor} \, \rpnt{ev_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, .. \, \rpnt{ev_{\rpmv{n}}}}{}{}{}{\rpcom{dictionary constructor}}}

\newcommand{\rpevctx}{
\rprulehead{\rpnt{evctx}  ,\ \Delta}{::=}{\rpcom{evidence context}}\rpprodnewline
\rpfirstprodline{|}{\varnothing}{}{}{}{}\rpprodnewline
\rpprodline{|}{ \Delta ,  \rpmv{evidx} : \rpnt{pred} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\rpgrammar}{\rpgrammartabular{
\rpconst\rpinterrule
\rpctor\rpinterrule
\rpexpr\rpinterrule
\rppattern\rpinterrule
\rppatbranch\rpinterrule
\rppatmatrix\rpinterrule
\rptyctor\rpinterrule
\rptyvar\rpinterrule
\rptvset\rpinterrule
\rpkvar\rpinterrule
\rptyargs\rpinterrule
\rptypeexpr\rpinterrule
\rppredicate\rpinterrule
\rppredicates\rpinterrule
\rpscheme\rpinterrule
\rpcontext\rpinterrule
\rpconstraint\rpinterrule
\rpconstraints\rpinterrule
\rpsubst\rpinterrule
\rpevidence\rpinterrule
\rpevctx\rpafterlastrule
}}

% defnss
% defns TigrisTyping
%% defn Unify
\newcommand{\rpdruleUXXRefl}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \varnothing   \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{U\_Refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleUXXVarL}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{ \rpnt{tv}  \notin   \mathsf{ftv}( \rpnt{ty} )  }%
}{
 \rpnt{tv}  \mapsto  \rpnt{ty}   \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{U\_VarL}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleUXXVarR}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{ \rpnt{tv}  \notin   \mathsf{ftv}( \rpnt{ty} )  }%
}{
 \rpnt{tv}  \mapsto  \rpnt{ty}   \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{U\_VarR}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleUXXArrow}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{a}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{a'}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{\theta_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpsym{[}  \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{b}  \rpsym{,}  \rpsym{[}  \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{b'}  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
 \theta_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \circ  \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}   \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{a}  \to  \rpnt{b}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{a'}  \to  \rpnt{b'}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{U\_Arrow}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleUXXProd}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{a}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{a'}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{\theta_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpsym{[}  \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{b}  \rpsym{,}  \rpsym{[}  \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{b'}  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
 \theta_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \circ  \theta_{{\mathrm{1}}}   \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{a}  \times  \rpnt{b}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{a'}  \times  \rpnt{b'}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{U\_Prod}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnUnify}[1]{\begin{rpdefnblock}[#1]{$\theta  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{)}$}{\rpcom{Unification of types}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleUXXRefl{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleUXXVarL{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleUXXVarR{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleUXXArrow{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleUXXProd{}}
\end{rpdefnblock}}

%% defn Solve
\newcommand{\rpdruleSlvXXEmpty}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\rpsym{(}   \varnothing   \rpsym{,}  \varnothing  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}  \varnothing  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{Slv\_Empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleSlvXXEq}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\theta  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{unify} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{\rpsym{(}  \theta'  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{C}  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
\rpsym{(}   \theta'  \circ  \theta   \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}   \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \sim  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}} ,  \rpnt{C}   \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{Slv\_Eq}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleSlvXXPred}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpsym{(}  \theta  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{C}  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
\rpsym{(}  \theta  \rpsym{,}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpsym{pred,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}    \rpnt{pred} _ \rpmv{evidx}  ,  \rpnt{C}   \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{Slv\_Pred}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnSolve}[1]{\begin{rpdefnblock}[#1]{$\rpsym{(}  \theta  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{C}  \rpsym{)}$}{\rpcom{Constraint solving}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleSlvXXEmpty{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleSlvXXEq{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleSlvXXPred{}}
\end{rpdefnblock}}

%% defn Instantiate
\newcommand{\rpdruleInstXXForall}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpnt{tv'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh} \quad .. \quad \rpnt{tv'_{\rpmv{n}}}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
\rppremise{\theta  \rpsym{=}  \rpsym{\{}  \rpnt{tv_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \mapsto  \rpnt{tv'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,} \, .. \, \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{tv_{\rpmv{n}}}  \mapsto  \rpnt{tv'_{\rpmv{n}}}  \rpsym{\}}}%
}{
\rpsym{(}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \bar{\pi}'  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{inst} \, \rpsym{(}  \forall \, \rpnt{tv_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, .. \, \rpnt{tv_{\rpmv{n}}}  .  \bar{\pi}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{Inst\_Forall}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnInstantiate}[1]{\begin{rpdefnblock}[#1]{$\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{inst} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{sch}  \rpsym{)}$}{\rpcom{Scheme instantiation}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleInstXXForall{}}
\end{rpdefnblock}}

%% defn Generalize
\newcommand{\rpdruleGenXXGen}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\bar{\alpha}  \rpsym{=}   \rpsym{(}    \mathsf{ftv}( \rpnt{ty} )   \cup   \mathsf{ftv}( \bar{\pi} )    \rpsym{)}  \setminus   \mathsf{ftv}( \Gamma )  }%
}{
\rpsym{(}  \bar{\alpha}  .  \bar{\pi}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{gen} \, \rpsym{(}  \Gamma  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}}{%
{\rpdrulename{Gen\_Gen}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnGeneralize}[1]{\begin{rpdefnblock}[#1]{$\rpnt{sch}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{gen} \, \rpsym{(}  \Gamma  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}$}{\rpcom{Generalization}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleGenXXGen{}}
\end{rpdefnblock}}

%% defn InferExpr
\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXVar}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{sch} \, \in \, \Gamma}%
\rppremise{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{inst} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{sch}  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXInt}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpmv{intlit}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Int}   \rpsym{;}  \varnothing}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXString}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpmv{strlit}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{String}   \rpsym{;}  \varnothing}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_String}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXTrue}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpkw{true}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Bool}   \rpsym{;}  \varnothing}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_True}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXFalse}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpkw{false}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Bool}   \rpsym{;}  \varnothing}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_False}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXUnit}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpsym{()}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Unit}   \rpsym{;}  \varnothing}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Unit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXLam}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
\rppremise{ \Gamma ,  \rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{tv}   \vdash  \rpnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda\  \rpmv{x} .\  \rpnt{e}   \Rightarrow  \rpnt{tv}  \to  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Lam}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXApp}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\rppremise{\rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{a}  \rpsym{;}   \rpsym{(}   \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ,  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \rpsym{)} ,  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \sim  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \to  \rpnt{a} }{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_App}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXProd}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{)}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \times  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}   \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ,  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Prod}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXCond}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{3}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \mathbf{if} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \mathbf{then} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \mathbf{else} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}   \rpsym{(}   \rpsym{(}   \rpsym{(}   \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ,  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \rpsym{)} ,  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{3}}}}   \rpsym{)} ,  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \sim   \mathsf{Bool}    \rpsym{)} ,  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \sim  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{3}}}} }{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Cond}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXLet}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\rppremise{\rpsym{(}  \theta  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{\rpnt{sch}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{gen} \, \rpsym{(}  \Gamma  \rpsym{,}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{ \Gamma ,  \rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{sch}   \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \mathbf{let} \, \rpmv{x}  \rpsym{=}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \mathbf{in} \, \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXFix}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
\rppremise{ \Gamma ,  \rpmv{f}  :  \rpnt{tv}   \vdash  \rpnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpkw{fix} \, \rpsym{(}   \lambda\  \rpmv{f} .\  \rpnt{e}   \rpsym{)}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}   \rpnt{C} ,  \rpnt{tv}  \sim  \rpnt{ty} }{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Fix}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXLetRec}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
\rppremise{ \Gamma ,  \rpmv{x}  :  \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{tv}  \rpsym{)}   \vdash  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\rppremise{\rpsym{(}  \theta  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{solve} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{\rpnt{sch}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{gen} \, \rpsym{(}  \Gamma  \rpsym{,}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}}%
\rppremise{ \Gamma ,  \rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{sch}   \vdash  \rpnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \mathbf{let} \, \rpmv{x}  \rpsym{=}  \rpnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \mathbf{in} \, \rpnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpsym{[}  \theta  \rpsym{]}  \rpnt{C}}{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_LetRec}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdruleIXXAscribe}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}}%
\rppremise{\rpsym{(}  \rpnt{ty'}  \rpsym{,}  \bar{\pi}  \rpsym{)}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{inst} \, \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{sch}  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e}  :  \rpnt{sch}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty'}  \rpsym{;}   \rpnt{C} ,  \rpnt{ty}  \sim  \rpnt{ty'} }{%
{\rpdrulename{I\_Ascribe}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnInferExpr}[1]{\begin{rpdefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \rpnt{ty}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}$}{\rpcom{Constraint-based inference}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXVar{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXInt{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXString{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXTrue{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXFalse{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXUnit{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXLam{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXApp{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXProd{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXCond{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXLet{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXFix{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXLetRec{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdruleIXXAscribe{}}
\end{rpdefnblock}}

%% defn InferPat
\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXWild}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \_  \Rightarrow  \Gamma  \rpsym{;}  \varnothing  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_Wild}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXVar}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpmv{x} \, \not\in \, \mathsf{dom} \, \rpsym{(}  \Gamma  \rpsym{)}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpmv{x}  \Rightarrow   \Gamma ,  \rpmv{x}  :  \rpnt{ty}   \rpsym{;}  \varnothing  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_Var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXConstInt}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpmv{intlit}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}  \sim   \mathsf{Int}   \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_ConstInt}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXConstStr}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpmv{strlit}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}  \sim   \mathsf{String}   \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_ConstStr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXConstTrue}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpkw{true}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}  \sim   \mathsf{Bool}   \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_ConstTrue}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXConstFalse}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpkw{false}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}  \sim   \mathsf{Bool}   \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_ConstFalse}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXConstUnit}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpsym{()}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}  \sim   \mathsf{Unit}   \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_ConstUnit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\rpdrulePXXProd}[1]{\rpdrule[#1]{%
\rppremise{\rpnt{a}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
\rppremise{\rpnt{b}  \rpsym{=} \, \mathsf{fresh}}%
\rppremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{a}}%
\rppremise{\Gamma_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \vdash  \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{b}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \rpsym{(}  \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rpsym{,}  \rpnt{pat_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \rpsym{)}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \rpsym{;}   \rpsym{(}   \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ,  \rpnt{C_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \rpsym{)} ,  \rpnt{ty}  \sim  \rpnt{a}  \times  \rpnt{b}   \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}}{%
{\rpdrulename{P\_Prod}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnInferPat}[1]{\begin{rpdefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \rpnt{pat}  \Rightarrow  \Gamma'  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{C}  \rpsym{;}  \rpnt{ty}$}{\rpcom{Pattern inference}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXWild{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXVar{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXConstInt{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXConstStr{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXConstTrue{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXConstFalse{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXConstUnit{}}
\rpusedrule{\rpdrulePXXProd{}}
\end{rpdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\rpdefnsTigrisTyping}{
\rpdefnUnify{}\rpdefnSolve{}\rpdefnInstantiate{}\rpdefnGeneralize{}\rpdefnInferExpr{}\rpdefnInferPat{}}

\newcommand{\rpdefnss}{
\rpdefnsTigrisTyping
}

\newcommand{\rpall}{\rpmetavars\\[0pt]
\rpgrammar\\[5.0mm]
\rpdefnss}
